# braintrustdata_view (Resource)

Manages a Braintrust view.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a project to own the view.
resource "braintrustdata_project" "example" {
  name = "example-view-project"
}

# Manage a view within that project.
resource "braintrustdata_view" "example" {
  object_id   = braintrustdata_project.example.id
  object_type = "project"
  view_type   = "experiments"
  name        = "example-view"

  options = jsonencode({
    freezeColumns = false
    viewType      = "table"
  })

  view_data = jsonencode({
    search = {
      filter = []
      match  = []
      sort   = []
      tag    = []
    }
  })
}

output "view_id" {
  value = braintrustdata_view.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The view name.
- `object_id` (String) The object ID that owns the view.
- `object_type` (String) The object type that owns the view.
- `view_type` (String) The view type.

### Optional

- `options` (String) Optional view options as a JSON-encoded object. Setting this attribute to null sends an explicit clear on update. Omitting this attribute from configuration may preserve the prior API value because it is Optional + Computed with UseStateForUnknown semantics.
- `view_data` (String) Optional view definition as a JSON-encoded object. Setting this attribute to null sends an explicit clear on update. Omitting this attribute from configuration may preserve the prior API value because it is Optional + Computed with UseStateForUnknown semantics.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the view was created.
- `deleted_at` (String) The deletion timestamp, if the view has been soft-deleted.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the view.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user who created the view.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import braintrustdata_view.example "view-id,project-id,project"
```
